headline: QUICK SPARK: Jim Cramer Says 'Nebius Is at the Nexus of the Craziness'
summary: Nebius is facing scrutiny as Jim Cramer warns investors of further decline. Cramer advises waiting for better prices and notes recent tech sector turbulence.

raw.headline: QUICK SPARK: Jim Cramer Says 'Nebius Is at the Nexus of the Craziness'
raw.summary: Nebius is facing scrutiny as Jim Cramer warns investors of further decline. Cramer advises waiting for better prices and notes recent tech sector turbulence.

headline: Jim Cramer Says Microchip Is Near A Bottom — 'I Don't See It Yet' — While Nebius Is 'Not Done Going Down'
summary: Cramer gave his opinions on several stocks, including MCHP, VRT, AAOI, PWR, WCC, NBUS, COKE, and EXLS. He suggested waiting for better prices.
